Name: Jasper BLM Events
Description: General-purpose Black Mage event profile for PvE. Keeps Addle/Manaward support, optional cooldown holds, DOT helpers, wipe/zone reset scaffolding, and optional out-of-combat Sprint for roulette-safe play.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Black Mage ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default Black Mage toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default Black Mage toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: Addle TB
Events.Description: Uses Addle for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Events.Name: Manaward Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Manaward when self HP drops low outside scripted raidwide handling.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 70%
Conditions.Description: Self HP safety threshold for personal mitigation.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Black Mage ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Logics.Name: Addle TB
Logics.Description: Uses Addle for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Logics.Name: Manaward Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Manaward when self HP drops low outside scripted raidwide handling.
